title: 12" X 1/2" Inch Crowbar Heavy Duty Wrecking Tool Forged Carbon Steel Swan Neck Pry Bar For Lifting Floorboards Nail Puller Demolition Tool 30cm Wrecking Bar Hex Shaped Crow Bars
features: 300mm Crow Bar - Manufactured Using A Heavy Duty Drop Forged Carbon Steel, These Crowbars Measure Approximately 12" X 1/2" (30cm X 1.25cm) And Feature A 6cm Swan Neck For Pulling And Prying Floorboards And Nails. This Pry Tool Has A Black Painted Finish To Protect Against Rust And Corrosion.

Mini Crowbar - The 12'' Length And Swan Neck Design Of This Crow Bar Allows For Extra Leverage When Prying Or Dismantling Floorboards Or Pallets. This Small Crowbar Is Designed With An Integrated Nail Puller, Making It Easy To Remove Nails And Other Fasteners.

Crow Bars Heavy Duty - The Wrecking Bar Is Crafted Using Solid Forged, Hardened And Tempered Carbon Steel, Which Helps Ensure Long-lasting Performance And Durability. Designed To Withstand Tough Conditions And Heavy Use, This Prybar Is Made For Longevity.

12 Inch Crowbar - These Wrecking Bars Feature A Black Powder Coated Finish And The Ends Of This Mini Pry Bar Have Been Ground Down To A Polished Finish Which Help Provide Corrosion And Rust Resistance.

Versatile Pry Bar Tool - This Pry Bars Are An Extremely Versatile Tool That Can Be Used For A Wide Range Of Applications, Such As; Removing, Pulling, Prying, And Splitting Wood. It Is Ideal For Use In Flooring, Door Frames, And Other General Wrecking And Demolition Work.
